entries.title: QUESTIONS ON RUTH on ruth 2:12
entries.excerpt: The story of Boaz also teaches us about virtue. For he not only liberally shares his grain with Ruth but also consoles her with words. Not only does he share food with her but also was himself the minister of his kindness; so that whoever does not order another person to be his minister, but prepares the flour and bread himself, will have given very liberally indeed.

entries.title: QUESTIONS ON RUTH on ruth 2:12
entries.excerpt: The blessing followed as Boaz said it would. For Ruth received the full reward from God, so that she was the progenitor of the blessing of the nations.
